title: stachys boraginoides
intro: Stachys boraginoides, also known as bugle, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Stachys boraginoides include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Stachys boraginoides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
